credentials.name: WordPress Application Password
credentials.description: WordPress REST API authentication using username and application password
credentials.instructions:
1. Log in to your WordPress admin panel
2. Go to Users → Profile
3. Scroll down to Application Passwords
4. Enter a name (e.g. "cortask") and click Add New Application Password
5. Copy the generated password - REMOVE ALL SPACES before saving it
   - WordPress shows: Tz0M 9kCi 0jPb 3QU6 O8oC qMsN
   - You must save: Tz0M9kCi0jPb3QU6O8oCqMsN (no spaces)

Requires WordPress 5.6+ with HTTPS enabled (unless localhost)

validation.message: Must be a valid URL without trailing slash (e.g., https://example.com)
Must be 24 characters with no spaces (remove spaces from WordPress-generated password)
